## Feature Request

### Problem Description

A clear description of the problem you are trying to solve. What is frustrating or missing today?

### Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like. Include code examples if possible.

```typescript
// Example of how the feature might look in practice
```

### Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered and why they are insufficient.

### Affected Package(s)

Which CoFounder package(s) does this relate to? Check all that apply.

- [ ] `@waymakerai/aicofounder-core`
- [ ] `@waymakerai/aicofounder-guard`
- [ ] `@waymakerai/aicofounder-compliance`

### Use Case

Describe the real-world use case where this feature would help. Who benefits and how?

### Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, references, or links that support this request.
